name: Energy & Utilities (DACH)
description: Energy producers, grid operators, and utility companies in the DACH region requiring KRITIS-compliant cloud infrastructure for OT/IT convergence, smart grid platforms, and regulated workload modernization during the Energiewende transition.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CIO, Head of IT/OT Convergence, VP Digital, CISO

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on energy-sector IT spend in DACH

tam.description: Total IT spend by energy and utilities companies in DACH (~EUR 6B)

sam.description: Cloud infrastructure, managed services and SAP hosting for energy sector

som.description: Capturable share through KRITIS-compliant sovereign cloud and Deutsche Telekom energy-sector relationships

competitive_landscape: Atos/Eviden, Capgemini, IBM, AWS, Innogy/E.ON Digital, regional IT providers
